title: [ImportLiberty] Allow missing "function" attribute in cell
body:
Liberty seems to allow defining cell without "function" attributes. 

https://github.com/OpenTimer/OpenTimer/blob/master/benchmark/c17/c17_Early.lib
```
$ circt-translate --import-liberty c17_Early.lib
c17_Early.lib:72:3: error: expected function attribute
  pin (ZN) {
  ^
```

Import this to HWModuleExtern.
code_blocks:
$ circt-translate --import-liberty c17_Early.lib
c17_Early.lib:72:3: error: expected function attribute
  pin (ZN) {
  ^
